title: LionStride Elite Management Officially Launches
description: LionStride Elite Management is officially open for operations, focused on placing elite and emerging endurance athletes in competitive international races and building long-term professional careers.

title: Justilin Foimi Signs with LionStride as First Represented Athlete
description: Cameroon marathon runner Justilin Foimi becomes the first athlete represented by LionStride Elite Management, bringing a strong record of regional wins and national championship titles.

title: Outreach Campaign Launched for 2026 International Race Calendar
description: LionStride has initiated contact with race directors across Europe and West Africa to secure competitive race placements for Justilin Foimi ahead of the 2026 international marathon season.

title: First Partnership Agreement Under Negotiation
description: LionStride Elite Management is in active discussion with its first race organizer partnership, a key step toward establishing a sustainable network for athlete placement and career development.

title: Athlete Development Programme Underway
description: Justilin Foimi is currently in a structured training block with the goal of improving his marathon personal best and targeting top-five finishes in upcoming international competitions.

title: LionStride Sets Vision for Year One
description: As the agency completes its first quarter, LionStride has outlined its year-one goals: secure three international race placements, grow athlete representation, and establish a credible presence in the global endurance racing community.
